input: user-POI check-in sequences and global POI graph
output: ranked list of next POIs for a user
backbone: temporal-aware self-attentive GCN with channel attention
key_idea: extract local structures from a global POI graph and use temporal-aware self-attentive GCN plus channel attention to capture sequential visitation patterns and feature-channel relationships
datasets: three real-world datasets (not named in abstract)
